title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at MSC India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at MSC India
jsonLd.description:
Join the MSC India family as a Fleet Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MSC India:
MSC India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MSC India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
